scripts.sonar: npm run eslint:sonar; npm run test:unit:sonar; sonar-scanner
scripts.db:prepare: docker-compose exec backend npm run db:setup:dev
scripts.audit: npm audit --prefix backend > tmp/audit-backend.txt; npm audit --prefix frontend > tmp/audit-frontend.txt
scripts.npm-check: npx npm-check backend > tmp/npm-check-backend.txt; npx npm-check frontend > tmp/npm-check-frontend.txt
scripts.depcheck: npx depcheck backend > tmp/depcheck-backend.txt; npx depcheck frontend > tmp/depcheck-frontend.txt
scripts.madge-orphans: npx madge --orphans backend/src/controllers backend/src/service backend/src/repository > tmp/madge-orphans-backend.txt
scripts.madge-leaves: npx madge --leaves backend/src/controllers backend/src/service backend/src/repository > tmp/madge-leaves-backend.txt
scripts.madge: npm run madge-circular; npm run madge-orphans; npm run madge-leaves;
scripts.quality: npm run audit; npm run npm-check; npm run depcheck; npm run madge; npm run eslintcc
